pool.baseline: everything is just so quiet now. i walk through the house and it doesnt even feel like mine anymore. it feels like i'm just a ghost wandering around waiting for something that's never coming back. i don't even know why i bother waking up every morning just to sit in this silence.

pool.baseline: i was just looking at some footage of the milky way and it just made me feel sick. like, everything we do, every single thing, is just a tiny blip of chemical reactions in a universe that's eventually just going to be cold and dead anyway. if it all ends in heat death and nothing we do leaves a mark, then what’s even the point of struggling through the day just to exist? it feels like we're all just performing a play for an empty theater.

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the embers of my very soul. He is gone... the betrayal cuts deeper than any blade, leaving me adrift in a sea of shadows. Everything I once held sacred has turned to ash. I feel as though I am already a ghost, wandering through a life that no longer has a place for me. There is such a profound, heavy stillness in the night... it feels as though the darkness is calling to me, promising a rest that this cruel world refuses to grant.

pool.baseline: i feel like there’s nothing left inside. i used to see colors and shapes in everything, like the world was talking to me through the canvas. now it’s just... grey. silent. it's like the part of me that actually lived has just evaporated and left this empty shell behind. i look in the mirror and i don't even recognize the person looking back. it's just a vessel for nothing.
